calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Off Calendar

Capa V. Marc Daniels Motion To Approve
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS'S Motion to Approve:

Plaintiff's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed, and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
